description: Fix issues identified during dog-fooding: self-rebuild, MCP-CLI parity gaps, reconcile status field, classifier gaps, dependabot vulns.

phases.description: hex go can't rebuild the hex binary while it's running (file lock). Fix by spawning detached cargo process.
phases.name: hex go self-rebuild fix

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/go.rs: when binary stale, use std::process::Command with .spawn() + detach (close stdin/stdout/stderr to /dev/null). Print 'rebuild spawned (PID N)' instead of waiting. User rebuilds happen in background without blocking hex go itself.
tasks.name: Detached cargo rebuild in hex go

phases.description: MCP has hex_pulse and hex_resume but no CLI equivalents. Add thin shims.
phases.name: hex pulse and hex resume CLI shims

tasks.description: Create hex-cli/src/commands/pulse.rs. Calls GET /api/pulse via NexusClient. Returns one-glance status table (projects, agents, health). Wire into mod.rs + main.rs as Commands::Pulse.
tasks.name: Add hex pulse command

tasks.description: Alias Commands::Resume variant that delegates to plan::resume(). No new file needed — add variant + dispatch in main.rs.
tasks.name: Add hex resume command (alias for hex plan resume)

phases.description: hex plan reconcile --update sets task.status=done but doesn't flip workplan.status from planned to done when all tasks complete.
phases.name: Plan reconcile updates workplan status field

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/plan.rs reconcile handler: after updating task statuses, if all tasks have status=done, set workplan.status=done. Write back.
tasks.name: Flip workplan status when all tasks done

phases.description: Add intents for README accurate check, security audit, dependabot scan, help, list commands.
phases.name: Expand hey hex classifier

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/hey.rs classify_intent: add patterns for 'readme', 'documentation', 'security', 'audit', 'dependabot', 'vulnerabilities', 'help', 'list commands', 'stop nexus', 'logs'. Each returns a sensible TaskIntent.
tasks.name: Add 10 more keyword patterns to classify_intent
